title: Incremental Sync + DNA-Lite Polling Architecture
changes: Server: incremental sync via ?since= parameter (returns only changed nodes)
Server: DNA-lite mode strips heavy fields (findings, implementation, reviews) for bulk responses
Server: ?dna=full parameter for full DNA when needed
Server: change_seq watermark in response for client sync tracking
Server: compact JSON (no pretty-printing) reduces payload ~7%
Server: stats (queue_count, active_count, completed_count) merged into /api/data response
Client: incremental merge (mergeIncrementalData) — updates/inserts changed nodes
Client: lastSeq tracking for incremental polling
Client: error recovery resets to full bootstrap
